_instructions: Add one entry per incumbent. 'office_slug' must match a slug in your offices table (e.g. 'county-executive', 'county-council-member', 'sheriff', 'states-attorney', 'board-of-education', etc.). 'district_name' should match the district_name in your contests table exactly, or null for county-wide offices. 'jurisdiction_slug' must match a slug in your jurisdictions table.
